hero.title: Clear Skin,
hero.subtitle: Reclaim smooth, healthy skin with a personalized acne treatment plan at Aura Wellness. We guarantee visible results after your very first session.

items.title: Personalized Treatment Plans
items.desc: Every skin tells its own story. We design each treatment plan based on your real skin condition after a 3D skin scan.

items.title: Guaranteed Results
items.desc: Reduce inflammatory acne by 80% after just 3 intensive sessions using biological light therapy.
